examples: Objective To evaluate the mental health state of enrollee.
Conclusion Generally speaking, the mental health state of enrollee is normal.
In 2006, Medicare spent fifteen thousand dollars per enrollee here, almost twice the national average.
Once an enrollee in the new plan meets the yearly deductible, Medicare will pay 100% of approved services.
Medicaid spends almost five times as much per enrollee for the elderly as it does for young adults or kids.
